author: doll-agent
content:
Done — implemented WritebackGuard<'a, T, D> in ferray-core/src/writeback.rs.

API:
- new(target) clones target's logical contents into a contiguous scratch.
- scratch() / scratch_mut() for kernel access.
- commit() consumes self, writes scratch back via element-by-element iter_mut (any target layout including F-order, non-contig slices).
- discard() consumes self without writeback.
- Drop without commit leaves target untouched — matches numpy's WRITEBACKIFCOPY panic safety.

6 tests covering commit, discard, panic-safety drop, 2D, scratch initialization, and F-order target. ferray-core: 623 -> 629 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Workspace builds clean. Commit bec27228.
